name: content-engine
description: Unified LinkedIn content engine: one pipeline for ABM, TOFU, MOFU, and BOFU posts, pulling viral formats from selectable libraries (Virio corpus, Millie's curated list, and the weekly Emerging scan — multi-select, pooled). Resolves named clients via Virio first (no web-guessing who they are). Pick a winning draft and it generates a paste-ready Claude graphic prompt. Self-heals a stale local library. Also mines LinkedIn creator strategies per client — discover creators in the client's space, or mine a pasted profile or list — into per-creator strategy cards (/content-engine:creators). Merges the former abm-engine and funnel-engine plugins.
